title: trifolium repens var. glareosum
intro: Trifolium repens var. glareosum, commonly known as yellow clover, is a perennial legume that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Trifolium repens var. glareosum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as providing relief from digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Trifolium repens var. glareosum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
